label: Map Embed
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for embedding a location map next to an address block. Default implementation is an OpenStreetMap iframe (no API key, no tracker, GDPR-friendly) with a static fallback image and a 'directions' link that deep-links into the visitor's native maps app (geo: URL on Android, maps:// on iOS, Google Maps URL on web). NO Google Maps JS SDK — that requires a billed API key and ships a 200KB+ tracker. Hard alternatives (google-maps-react, mapbox-gl) are planned imports for sites needing custom markers or routing.
